data.title: Innovatix Launches OpenParser AI: Document Intelligence Platform That Cites Every Answer
data.description: In Bedminster, New Jersey, Innovatix has launched OpenParser AI, a revolutionary document intelligence system specifically designed for regulated industries. This secure on-premise deployment offers reliable data privacy and is free of hallucinations. This innovative solution has garnered attention for its cutting-edge technology.

data.title: 'All Roads Lead To XRP,' Ripple CEO Says: What Does He Mean?
data.description: Ripple's CEO, Brad Garlinghouse, has identified XRP as the company's guiding principle, referring to it as the "North Star" amidst a crucial decision facing the token within the next 24 to 48 hours. Garlinghouse emphasized that XRP is at the core of Ripple's strategy for cross-border payments and the development of the XRP Ledger, highlighting its significance amid global adoption efforts. In a recent post, Garlinghouse echoed Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian's perspective on a CEO's duty to consistently reinforce the company's core focus. The statement underscores XRP's pivotal role within Ripple. Additionally, Ripple and OKX announced a collaboration to introduce RLUSD for spot trading across more than 280 trading pairs, expanding the token's accessibility to traders. This partnership signifies a significant move to bolster the presence of RLUSD in the trading market.

data.title: Jerome Powell Set To Chair Last Fed Meeting: What Does It Mean For Bitcoin?
data.description: Bitcoin reached $77,000 on Wednesday amidst discussions on how the leadership change at the Federal Reserve will affect the cryptocurrency. In a podcast on April 29, analyst Benjamin Cowen noted that historically, Bitcoin performs well in loose monetary conditions. The upcoming Federal Open Market Committee meeting, likely the last under Jerome Powell's chairmanship, marks the "end of an era," according to Cowen. While there are expectations for rate cuts under new leadership, Cowen believes this is improbable in the short run due to ongoing inflation. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Robinhood Stock Tanks To $73, But Bernstein Targets Higher For HOOD
data.description: Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD) saw its stock price drop to $73 on Wednesday following a 47% decrease in Q1 crypto revenue, which totaled $134 million. Despite this decline, Bernstein is maintaining its target price for the stock at $130. The company reported a significant decrease in cryptocurrency revenues and native-app notional trading volumes, which were down by 47% and 48% year-over-year, respectively. Crypto revenue now only makes up 13% of the total revenue, compared to 17% in Q4 2025. Q1 revenue reached $1.067 billion, missing estimates by 7%, while adjusted EBITDA of $534 million fell short of expectations by 9%. Despite the drop in crypto revenue, Robinhood managed to achieve a 3% increase in net income, reaching $346 million, demonstrating continued profitability. The company's prediction markets, along with gold subscriptions, were highlighted as successful growth areas, with event contracts trading a record 8.8 billion units in Q1.

data.title: AstraZeneca Flexes Cancer Drugs Performance, Pipeline Strength
data.description: AstraZeneca Plc (NASDAQ: AZN) exceeded expectations in the first quarter of 2026, with reported revenue reaching $15.29 billion, marking a 13% increase year over year or 8% growth at constant currency (CC). Adjusted earnings per share stood at $2.58, surpassing the anticipated $2.51. Notably, the oncology segment drove significant growth, contributing 45% of product revenue, which reached $6.79 billion, up 20% from the previous year or 16% at CC. Tagrisso sales rose by 9% to $1.83 billion, while Imfinzi revenue surged by 34% to $1.69 billion. Additionally, Calquence sales grew by 21% to $923 million, and Enhertu revenue increased by 40% to $831 million. However, other segments, such as cardiovascular, renal, and metabolism, saw mixed results, with revenue totaling $3.24 billion, representing 21% of product sales. Despite this, these segments experienced a 7% decline at constant currency due to foreign exchange factors.

data.title: Middleburg and Lingerfelt Announce Closing of 390-Unit Class A Development in the Richmond MSA
data.description: In Vienna and Richmond, Virginia, Middleburg and Lingerfelt have revealed intentions to construct a 390-unit Class A multifamily complex in Chesterfield County, part of the Richmond MSA and the state's fastest-growing county. This will be Middleburg's fifth ground-up development in Richmond since 2023. Construction for Silas at West Hundred is set to commence in April 2026, with the first units expected to be available by October 2027. The project's financing has been finalized.

data.title: Hexnode Appoints Carl Carozza as Vice President of Enterprise Sales, Americas
data.description: In San Francisco, Hexnode, the enterprise software division of Mitsogo Inc., has appointed Carl Carozza as the new Vice President of Enterprise Sales, Americas. Carozza will oversee enterprise sales strategy in North America and LATAM, aiming to enhance customer relationships and bolster regional go-to-market efforts. His responsibilities include promoting growth in the company's endpoint management, security, and identity solutions.

data.title: Groove Technology Solutions Named Preferred Technology Partner for RangeWater Real Estate
data.description: In Salt Lake City on April 29, 2026, Groove Technology Solutions, a prominent provider of property technology for multifamily and student housing, revealed its appointment as a Preferred Technology Partner for RangeWater Real Estate. This partnership spans various ventures within the organization's portfolio.

data.title: AssureCare and Pillr Health Partner to Help Health Systems Tackle Specialty Pharmacy Costs
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Cincinnati, AssureCare® LLC, a prominent health care technology company specializing in intelligent population health management, partnered with Pillr Health, a top pharmacy optimization provider. The strategic partnership aims to enhance their services by integrating their expertise and resources. This collaboration between the two companies is expected to have a significant impact on improving health care outcomes for a large number of individuals.

data.title: Bath & Body Works Appoints Veronique Gabai-Pinsky as Chief Brand & Product Officer
data.description: Gabai-Pinsky has been appointed as the new Chief Brand & Product Officer for Bath & Body Works. In this role, she will oversee the brand, product, creative, and design aspects to drive the company's transformation and innovation efforts. This move aims to accelerate Bath & Body Works' progress in these areas, signaling a strategic shift in the company's leadership structure.

data.title: PulsePoint Launches Crossix Programmatic Optimizer, Enabling Native DTC Budget Optimization
data.description: Today, in Newark, New Jersey, PulsePoint, a top healthcare marketing technology firm, revealed that the Crossix Programmatic Optimizer is now integrated into its Life platform. This advancement offers pharma marketers the opportunity to utilize Crossix optimization metrics in an automated manner. This development is significant as it provides marketers with more streamlined access to valuable metrics for improving their campaigns.

data.title: Terry Crews x Cadillac Formula 1® Team: Crews Control Debuts May 5
data.description: A new premium YouTube series called Crews Control, hosted by actor and entertainer Terry Crews, will be launching on May 5, 2026. Produced by TWG Motorsports, the series consists of 18 episodes and promises a unique look into the world of motorsport. Featuring Terry Crews at the forefront, viewers can expect an exciting and engaging show tailored for fans of the genre.

data.title: Navinci launches Omni kit - the next generation of spatial interactomics
data.description: A company based in Uppsala, Sweden, called Navinci, has recently introduced a new product known as Omni on April 29, 2026. Omni is a revolutionary set of fully personalized kits that aim to revolutionize the way researchers investigate protein function within tissue samples. These kits come equipped with advanced spatial interactomics features, allowing for more precise and detailed analysis.

data.title: Empresa Distribuidora y Comercializadora Norte S.A. (EDENOR S.A.) Announces Early Tender Results of its Debt Tender Offer, Increase to Tender Cap and Election of Early Settlement
data.description: In Buenos Aires, Argentina, on April 29, 2026, Empresa Distribuidora y Comercializadora Norte S.A. (EDENOR S.A.) shared the preliminary outcomes of its tender offer. The company disclosed its intention to acquire a specific amount of outstanding shares for cash before the due date. The Offer is part of their strategic plan to secure up to a certain number of shares as per the tender terms. The Company eagerly awaits the final tally of responses from shareholders to proceed with the next steps in their acquisition process.
